news.t: Principal® Lists First Semi-Transparent ETF on NYSE
Columbia Threadneedle Investments Launches Columbia Seligman Semiconductor and Technology ETF (SEMI)

holdings.infoBox: SEMI is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 13.90%, Broadcom at 8.18%, Lam Research at 8.09%, Micron Technology at 7.53%, and Apple at 7.23%.

overview.description: The Columbia Select Technology ETF (SEMI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of technology and technology-related companies. SEMI was launched on Mar 29, 2022 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.

data.text: Several years ago, semiconductor ETFs were often viewed as a Nvidia (NVDA) story. With Nvidia driving much of the group's growth and performance, some investors questioned the need for broader exposur...

data.title: Principal® Lists First Semi-Transparent ETF on NYSE
data.text: DES MOINES, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Principal has launched its first actively managed, semi-transparent ETF. It's focused on non-traditional real estate sectors and available on the NYSE

data.title: Columbia Threadneedle Investments Launches Columbia Seligman Semiconductor and Technology ETF (SEMI)
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $SEMI--Columbia Threadneedle Investments today announced the expansion of its exchange-traded fund (ETF) offerings with the launch of its first actively managed, semi-trans...
